{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20562_1
|class_id=20562
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=collection@20562_2
|fame=17
|art=16
|fth=15
|civ=30
|tech=12
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail HP +10<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail HP +20<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail HP +30<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail HP +30<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail HP +30<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000<br> (Awakened)
}}
